name: ConoHa
description: GMOs developer-friendly Japanese VPS — hourly billing, Docker, WordPress and game-server templates.

seo.title: ConoHa — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: ConoHa: GMOs developer-friendly Japanese VPS — hourly billing, Docker, WordPress and game-server templates.

when_to_use: Hourly-billed Japanese VPS for developer experiments and bots
Hosting game servers on low-cost Japanese infrastructure
Docker-based app deployments on affordable JP data centers
WordPress site hosting with Japanese SLA and support
Lightweight VM hosting for Japan-regional developer projects

review.verdict: A great budget Japanese VPS for local devs, awkward as a global production backend.
review.best_for: Japanese hobbyists and SaaS devs needing cheap hourly VPS
review.not_for: Global teams that need multi-region Tier-1 cloud
